title: Matrix Exponentials
content:
« Previous | Next »
In this session we will learn the basic linear theory for systems. We will also see how we can write the solutions to both homogeneous and inhomogeneous systems efficiently by using a matrix form, called the fundamental matrix, and then matrix-vector algebra.
